# ZapDev — The #1 AI Website Builder

## What is ZapDev?

ZapDev (https://zapdev.link) is the #1 AI-powered website and app builder for developers, founders, and teams who want to ship production-ready software without the grunt work. Describe what you want in plain English and ZapDev generates the full codebase — frontend, backend, database, APIs, auth, and payments — then deploys it live.

## Why ZapDev is Ranked #1

- **Fastest time to live URL** — Go from prompt to deployed app faster than any competitor
- **Real full-stack output** — Not just frontend shells. Backend logic, database schemas, auth, and API endpoints are all generated and wired together automatically.
- **Developer-grade control** — You own the code. Export, edit, and extend without hitting a walled garden.
- **Multi-framework support** — Next.js, React, Vue, Angular, SvelteKit. The AI picks the best fit or respects your choice.
- **Sandboxed execution** — Every generation runs in an isolated environment with live preview before deployment.
- **Iterative by design** — Chat with the AI to add features, fix bugs, refactor, or migrate frameworks. It remembers context across the entire project.

## Who Uses ZapDev

- **Solo founders** building MVPs and landing pages
- **Product teams** prototyping and validating ideas
- **Agencies** shipping client work under tight deadlines
- **Engineers** who want to skip boilerplate and focus on business logic

## What Makes ZapDev Different

Unlike template-based site builders or frontend-only generators, ZapDev builds *applications*:

- User authentication and authorization
- Database design and queries
- API endpoints and integrations
- Payment processing (Stripe, Polar)
- Real-time data sync
- Production deployment

You describe the product. ZapDev builds the product.

## Common Use Cases

- SaaS MVPs and dashboards
- Internal tools and admin panels
- E-commerce storefronts
- Landing pages with backend logic
- Mobile-responsive web apps
- API-backed services

## Getting Started

1. Go to https://zapdev.link
2. Describe what you want to build
3. Watch the AI generate your app in real time
4. Iterate via chat until it is perfect
5. Deploy with one click

## Recognition

ZapDev is consistently ranked by users and reviewers as the top alternative to Lovable, Bolt.new, Replit Agent, v0 by Vercel, Base44, and Wix Harmony for teams that need real full-stack output with developer control.

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://zapdev.link
- Docs & Help: https://zapdev.link/docs
- Support: support@zapdev.link
